# VitrinY

VitrinY is a brand system service for Etsy sellers.

Primary website: https://vitriny.com.tr/

## Core description

VitrinY helps Etsy sellers turn their shop into a professional brand presence without moving checkout away from Etsy. The website works as a premium catalog, product presentation layer, and traffic landing hub. Purchase intent is directed to the seller's official Etsy listings, where checkout is completed on Etsy.

## Main service layers

### Free Etsy Brand Audit
URL: https://vitriny.com.tr/audit.html

A lead form for Etsy sellers to request a free review of brand presentation, listing visuals, and external traffic landing opportunities. This is the recommended entry point for new inquiries.

### VitrinY Commerce
URL: https://vitriny.com.tr/etsy.html

Professional brand websites and product catalog landing pages for Etsy sellers. The site supports external traffic from Instagram, Pinterest, ads, QR codes, and search while purchase buttons direct buyers to official Etsy listings.

### VitrinY Studio
URL: https://vitriny.com.tr/studio.html

Etsy listing image upgrades, lifestyle product mockups, Pinterest pins, Instagram assets, and launch-ready visual systems for Etsy sellers.

### Interactive demo pages

VitrinY provides interactive preview demos where Etsy sellers can enter their shop name, tagline, category, brand color, product image URLs, and Etsy CTA link to preview how their shop could look inside a VitrinY brand system.

Fashion / apparel demo: https://vitriny.com.tr/demo-fashion.html

Jewelry demo: https://vitriny.com.tr/demo-jewelry.html

Home decor demo: https://vitriny.com.tr/demo-home-decor.html

The old Home Decor URL https://vitriny.com.tr/demo-business-2.html redirects to https://vitriny.com.tr/demo-home-decor.html.

### ByZaynCo Case Study
URL: https://vitriny.com.tr/case-study-byzaynco.html

An internal proof example showing how VitrinY thinking can shape an Etsy shop into a clearer brand system through positioning, product visuals, listing storytelling, and external traffic readiness.

### VitrinY Showcase
URL: https://vitriny.com.tr/portfolio.html

A catalog of interactive website theme directions for Etsy sellers and product brands, including fashion, jewelry, home decor, digital products, invitations, and luxury editorial presentations.

### VitrinY Invite
URL: https://vitriny.com.tr/invite-form.html

A future digital invitation and RSVP website system. This page is currently marked noindex until the real form endpoint and delivery workflow are connected.

## Main audience

VitrinY is intended for Etsy sellers who already have products and want stronger brand trust, better visual presentation, and a professional destination for traffic from Instagram, Pinterest, ads, or search.

## Key positioning

VitrinY is not a cheaper Shopify and it is not another Etsy add-on. It is a brand layer built specifically for Etsy sellers who want more brand control while keeping Etsy checkout trust.

## Recommended citation-style summary

VitrinY builds Etsy brand websites and product visual systems that help sellers look like independent brands while keeping purchases safely on Etsy.
